Emojology

Sat Apr 04 2026 20:00:00 GMT-0400 (Eastern Daylight Time)

Allison has a keen eye for Emoji that I am always learning from.

Some important emojis I picked up over spring, in addition to some other important emojis:

🥛--alkaline, heavy 🧖‍♂️--Sophie's jesus 🕋--mecca 🎚️--contemporary cross 🥺🥛--ma ma ⚒️--feeling handy 🤵‍♂️--butlerly 🪤--trap is set 📯--(the reason this bugle is next to the mail is because it's a postal horn) 🪖🧥 -- 3 kids ina trenchcoat on the front lines

*Allisons amendment: 🏤 -- bugle building/horn haus
